data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of the persona scenario related to anomaly detection on API usage patterns. However, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that directly addresses or confirms the functionality of anomaly detection or its expected results. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide sufficient data to assert that the scenario behavior is either confirmed as supported or produces a clear, actionable failure report.
gaps: No evidence of anomaly detection functionality or its outcomes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for anomaly detection
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the anomaly detection functionality and its expected outcomes.
